validation_gates.reason: Repository, immutable base, target blob, package path, two-file change budget, review branch, and non-goals were resolved before mutation.

Existing packages/release placement and document identity were retained. Directory Rules, package/source/namespace boundaries, release authority, contracts, schemas, workflows, open pull requests, and matching branches were checked; no parallel authority or ADR trigger was introduced.
Main was rechecked at 2783739bba744f560772388a9969ed3107d08930 and the target blob remained e0f2aad3f3b1e70b15bd1f1b410c60852c9d41dd before branch creation.

Direct reads confirmed kfm-release version 0.0.0, incomplete package metadata, merged source and namespace v1.1 boundaries, empty __init__.py, and comment-only core.py. Bounded search established no functional consumer import or package-test reference.

The README separates concrete proposed PromotionDecision shape validation from thin ReleaseManifest, RollbackCard, and CorrectionNotice enforcement, placeholder or absent validators, proposed gate naming, draft signing, and explicit dry-run holds.

The README defines package identity, packaging/build/import/API, documentation-layer separation, bounded vocabulary, candidate-only responsibilities, authority boundaries, release-object maturity, lifecycle, dependency direction, signing/key custody, security, supply chain, resource limits, telemetry, consumers, testing, staged graduation, definition of done, verification, compatibility, correction, revocation, and rollback.

The final README has one H1, 55 headings with no hierarchy jumps or duplicate slugs, 62 resolved internal links, balanced code fences, no trailing whitespace, a parseable KFM Meta Block, and a final newline.
All thirty repository-relative evidence and authority paths in the KFM Meta Block were verified from current-session repository evidence.
The change contains no credentials, private keys, protected data, release records, trust-artifact instances, or publication action; key custody and authoritative writes remain external.
GitHub returned blob 749daf1f2cddbaa6b308584a630ac3f3d6707573 on commit cd6d4a8d8f88c3ac30fd70de412b7f168e6df8a0, matching the locally recomputed Git blob and SHA-256 artifact hash.
The connector exposes serialized Contents API writes. README and receipt are written sequentially on a scoped branch with remote read-back and final diff verification.
The package remains a greenfield placeholder and exposes no package-native implementation to execute. Pull-request workflows are observed separately.
Human review remains pending and separate from generation, merge, signing, release, and publication.
